name: bouncer-ui
description: Bouncer PDP UI - Policy Decision Point Management

authModes.note: JSON has no comments; this block documents how to switch the UI between mocked-subject and real OIDC. Edit ui/.env to flip modes. The UI also reads /auth/config from the API at startup, so VITE_AUTH_MODE is just the first-render hint.

mock.behavior: Login button shows a dropdown of seeded demo subjects. Axios sends X-Actor-Uid on every API call.

oidc.behavior: Login button redirects to VITE_OIDC_ISSUER (Auth Code + PKCE). After /callback the UI calls /auth/me and stores the resolved local Subject. Axios sends Authorization: Bearer <access_token> on every API call.
